nasb.text: If you make a sale, moreover, to your friend or buy from your friend’s hand, you shall not wrong one another.

esv.text: And if you make a sale to your neighbor or buy from your neighbor, you shall not wrong one another.

cnv.text: 如果你賣甚麼給鄰舍，或是從鄰舍的手裡買甚麼，你們不可欺負對方。

ccb.text: 因此，你们和同胞买卖田地时，不可彼此亏负。
